ddls:
CREATE TABLE "checkin_styles" (
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each check-in style */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the check-in style */,
  "internal_name" TEXT /* Internal name used by the system */,
  "parameter_type" TEXT /* Type of parameter associated with the style */,
  "is_sortable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the style can be sorted */,
  "based_on_property" TEXT /* Property on which the style is based */,
  "tooltip" TEXT /* Tooltip text explaining the style */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the check-in style was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the check-in style was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the style */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the style */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the check-in style is active */,
  "default_sort_order" INTEGER /* Default order for sorting the check-in style */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("style_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_checkin_styles_parameter_type FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_type") REFERENCES parameter_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_checkin_styles_based_on_property FOREIGN KEY ("based_on_property") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the parameter was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the parameter was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the parameter */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the parameter */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if the parameter is required */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value for the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameter_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the parameter type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the parameter type was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the parameter type */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the parameter type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the property */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the property */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the property was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the property was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the property */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the property */,
  "is_editable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the property is editable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "batch_processing" (
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each batch process */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* ID of the check-in style being processed */,
  "batch_number" INTEGER /* Batch number for the process */,
  "num_batches" INTEGER /* Total number of batches */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the batch process */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the batch process was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the batch process was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the batch process */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the batch process */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the batch process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("batch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_batch_processing_style_id FOREIGN KEY ("style_id") REFERENCES checkin_styles ("style_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., project manager, team lead, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the role was last updated */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON string containing permissions for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* ID of the check-in style configuration being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the configuration */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the configuration was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the access log was created */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_style_id FOREIGN KEY ("style_id") REFERENCES checkin_styles ("style_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "style_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* ID of the check-in style configuration */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the changes were made */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_style_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_style_versions_style_id FOREIGN KEY ("style_id") REFERENCES checkin_styles ("style_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "style_dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "parent_style_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent check-in style configuration */,
  "child_style_id" INTEGER /* ID of the child check-in style configuration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dependency */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the dependency was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the dependency was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the dependency */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the dependency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_style_dependencies_parent_style_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_style_id") REFERENCES checkin_styles ("style_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_style_dependencies_child_style_id FOREIGN KEY ("child_style_id") REFERENCES checkin_styles ("style_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_style_dependencies_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "style_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage event */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* ID of the check-in style configuration being used */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project where the style is used */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task where the style is used */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date when the style was used */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the usage event was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the usage event */,
  "usage_status" TEXT /* Status of the usage event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_style_usage_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_style_usage_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_style_usage_style_id FOREIGN KEY ("style_id") REFERENCES checkin_styles ("style_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_style_usage_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the project was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the project */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "task_name" TEXT /* Name of the task */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the task belongs to */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the task */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the task */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the task was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the task was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the task */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the task */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the task */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
